aws-sigv4.description: Pure-Rust AWS SigV4 request signer (canonical request + Authorization header)

cassandra.description: Cassandra / ScyllaDB (CQL v4) protocol: one QUERY per request over an internal per-target connection pool

cloudwatch.description: Batches snapshot series into AWS CloudWatch PutMetricData over SigV4-signed HTTPS

data-cleanup.description: Tracks the resources a run creates and deletes them at run end

datadog.description: Batches loadr snapshot series into the Datadog v2 series HTTP API keyed by an API key

db-seeder.description: Runs setup SQL before a run and teardown SQL after, for a known fixture state per run

elasticsearch.description: Elasticsearch protocol: index/get/search/bulk over the HTTP/JSON REST API

faker-gen.description: Seeded, pure-Rust fake-data generator: materialises CSV rows a CSV feeder pulls from

hmac-signer.description: Pure-Rust HMAC (SHA-256/512) request signer over a configurable canonical string

junit-report.description: Maps checks and thresholds to JUnit testcases and writes junit.xml

k8s-metrics.description: Polls metrics.k8s.io for pod CPU/memory and emits system-metric samples aligned to the run timeline

kafka.description: Apache Kafka protocol: produce/fetch via the pure-Rust rskafka client

mqtt.description: MQTT 3.1.1: publish and subscribe over an internal per-server connection pool

mysql.description: MySQL protocol: queries via sqlx with an internal per-URI pool

nats.description: NATS protocol: publish and request/reply over an internal per-server connection pool

oauth2-minter.description: Mints and auto-refreshes an OAuth2 bearer token shared by every VU

otlp-metrics.description: Encodes snapshot series as OTLP metrics (protobuf/JSON over OTLP/HTTP) and posts them to an OpenTelemetry collector

postgres.description: PostgreSQL protocol: queries via sqlx with an internal per-URI pool

redis.description: Redis (RESP) protocol: commands over an internal per-URI connection pool

redis-loader.description: Distributed shared data feeder: hands VUs values popped from a Redis list or read from a stream

s3-archive.description: Buffers the run report and uploads it gzip-compressed to S3 (SigV4)

s3-dataset.description: S3 dataset feeder: fetches an object from S3 (SigV4) and parses CSV/JSONL into feeder rows

slack-notifier.description: Posts a run summary and threshold verdict to a Slack incoming webhook

sql-feeder.description: Runs a SELECT once at startup and writes the rows as a JSON feeder file for the run

testcontainers.description: Starts declared containers for the run (Docker Engine API over /var/run/docker.sock) and removes them afterwards

vault-fetch.description: Fetches KV secrets from Vault at run start and serves them to VUs over a local endpoint

webhook.description: POSTs each snapshot and the summary as JSON to a configured HTTP endpoint with configurable headers
